title: Mother's Melodies
description: Replaces some sounds to those of the Mother/Earthbound series!
body:
Replaces most of the sounds in minecraft to those of the popular series Mother/Earthbound.

This is EXTREMELY work in progress, and right now only has sounds from SNES Earthbound on very specific sounds. I do plan to add sounds from Mother 3.

Right now it only replaces:
- Attack/Hurt sounds
- Eating sounds
- Totem sounds
- Portal sounds

Happy 15th anniversary Mother 3 :) _(Very late I know)_
